children.text: I help answer questions regarding love career dreams and all matters of the heart❤️

❗️IMPORTANT PLEASE READ❗️



👉🏻In regards to recent NEGATIVE reviews...predictions take TIME. Unless specified in my reading that things will change sooner. Most clients are unwilling to wait for things to unfold and unfortunately that isn't something I can help with. If you cannot wait to see how things unfold and to focus on positive vibrations until then...then it maybe that's the lesson your spirit guides want you to learn. If it's time to move on I will tell you! If there's a chance for change I will tell you! Do not get a reading with me unless you are unwilling to listen!!!!!!!!
 
👉🏻THREE MINUTES are short so please take into consideration the amount of questions asked with as much detail as possible. In order to help you I need to tap into the correct energies of concern in the short amount of time I have. Broad and vague questions may lead to vague answers. 

❗️❗️PLEASE READ THE ORDERING INSTRUCTIONS. NAME AND DATE OF BIRTH WOULD BE HELPFUL TO GET THE MOST ACCURATE DETAILS. ❗️❗️

♦️please ask the questions you want to ask when ordering a reading and NOT after in the comments section. When connecting to spirits I ask the questions you ask in the client order and relay them back to you.

♦️TIMEFRAMES given are the general areas of how I see things going at the moment. Free will may alter the time flow so please keep that in mind. time frames may happen sooner or later depending on free will and current energy flow.

♦️if you need clarity in regards to your reading please feel free to message me in the comments section.

❌I AM NOT A MEDIUM. Unfortunately that is not one of my gifts. 

❌PLEASE NO:
•medical 
•court related 
•past life
•lost objects or
•gambling 
Related questions 






My name is psychic Lynn and I am a third generation psychic. I posses an ability that connects me spiritually and emotionally  to my clients, this ability gives me a better understanding about your situation and questions. I also have the ability to hear and see your guides as well! I specialize in relationships career and finances as well as dream analysis. Do you wonder if he or she is the one? Or do you wonder if you're on the right career path? Or maybe you have weird reoccurring dreams and don't know what the meaning behind it is? I can answer your questions! No question is to small or to big to answer or to embarrassing! 



Specializing in:
❤️️Love/relationships 
💰Career/finances
😴Dream analysis


⭕️RELATIONSHIPS⭕️

There are many types of relationships and all are very different. There is the karmic relationship. The soulmate connection and the twin flame. Below is a brief description of these types of relationships. 

💕SOULMATE: the one relationship that many people yearn for. Finding the other half that makes you complete that one fairy tale ending. 

💔KARMIC: the relationship that is often filled with hard life lessons. These people aren't meant to take it easy on us! The addiction of karmic relationships is that it seems no matter how many times we try to make
It work it just won't. These relationships come into our lives to teach us or change us--and then leave.

🔥TWIN FLAME: often a mix of both karmic as well as soulmate. As the legend goes twin flames separated from one soul into two physical bodies. It's like a mirror like quality. These types of lovers often times make us confront our fears and ego driven desires. Often times this relationship comes with a lot of fierce passion as well as a lot of hurt. This may come as a lot of making up and breaking up! But either way something just keeps pulling these two together.
Dream analysis Psychic readings Relationship coaching
